comment: Diagnostic ZDL for the parameter-materialization-on-load problem. Current safe stage: Knob1 controls audio gain, three LineSel-cloned UI knobs are present, and the object-defined init shim performs only the stock-style __call_stub setup invocation that registers a Coe table via the callback at state[+136]. The next stage that called a cloned edit handler from init froze on boot, so this build intentionally does not call edit handlers.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category. Same as GAIN/PurestDr/TapeHack - a quiet place for a diagnostic.
fxid_comment: 0x0197 - next free in the custom Airwindows range.

params.name: Knob1
params.comment: params[5]. Audio gain observable. Switching away+back currently exposes whether the saved UI value has been materialized into the audio parameter table.
